hook.summary: Third-person gameplay of a heavily armed black robot targeting enemies in an urban environment.
hook.visual_action: The robot hovers and aims its four mounted guns at distant enemy markers while navigating a rooftop.

scene_flow: Third-person gameplay showing a heavy robot navigating a city environment and targeting enemies.
The robot fires its weapons, achieving a 'WRAMPAGE' and 'KILL' notification.
Transition effect showing a futuristic cockpit/interface closing in.
Final logo screen for 'War Robots' with 'PLAY FOR FREE!' text.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive multiplayer shooters and mecha-themed combat.
